source_meaning: to bring to light
target_meaning: to disclose something (especially secrets) unprompted

target_idiom: anh chột làm vua xứ mù
source_meaning: Boasting of oneself with cheap merits, being "king of the hill" when said hill is for example a garbage pile. It is easy as no one else wants to be the king of a garbage hill.
target_meaning: a mediocre person without any special qualities who stands out only because they are surrounded by people worse than them; big fish in a small pond

source_meaning: to have lived under a rock
target_meaning: to live as if one is a prehistoric man

source_meaning: eye for an eye
target_meaning: tit for tat

source_meaning: male or female latecomer
target_meaning: having more females than males

source_meaning: to run with the hare and hunt with the hounds (support both sides of an argument, conflict, etc.), to straddle
target_meaning: to two-time

source_meaning: calm before the storm (period of peace before a disturbance or crisis)
target_meaning: it is always darkest before the dawn

source_meaning: to drag through the mud
target_meaning: to tarnish; to besmirch

source_meaning: center of the universe, that which the world revolves around
target_meaning: the quality of being egocentric as a hypothetical center of the universe

source_meaning: famous (worldwide)
target_meaning: famous sights and beautiful landscapes; splendid tourist attractions

source_meaning: exhausted, stuffed (very tired)
target_meaning: packed like sardines

source_meaning: to leave someone in the lurch, to leave somebody holding the bag (to abandon somebody and leave him or her in a difficult situation)
target_meaning: to help others and abandon them halfway; to help irresponsibly

source_meaning: to put someone in their place; to exert dominance or superiority over someone
target_meaning: to treat somebody, especially a superior, overly casually due to familiarity

source_meaning: wilderness, inaccessible region
target_meaning: dangerous place that is difficult to access and full of obstacles

target_idiom: lấy dạ tiểu nhân đo lòng quân tử
source_meaning: Expressing doubt, skepticism.
target_meaning: to be cynical; to be skeptical of the integrity, sincerity, or motives of others; to psychologically project

source_meaning: ups and downs

source_meaning: where there is a will
target_meaning: the spirit is willing, but the flesh is weak

source_meaning: bone-idle, bone-lazy (utterly lazy)
target_meaning: extremely lazy, as if one's body were about to rot, with no life signals

source_meaning: quietly, without much fanfare (of doing some action as quietly as possible without making any unnecessary noise, especially when to do something surreptitiously)
target_meaning: any act carried out so clandestinely and secretly that all traces are erased, especially illicit affairs

target_meaning: deceiver, swindler, fraudster, scammer

source_meaning: to lie to one's face; lie egregiously or impudently; lie through one's teeth
target_meaning: shameless; barefaced

target_meaning: blood is thicker than water

source_meaning: to come at a price
target_meaning: to come only once and never come back

source_meaning: the chickens come home to roost; when one's mockery of something backfires and leads to unwanted consequences for them
target_meaning: Curses are like young chickens, they always come home to roost.

target_meaning: a beautiful woman's smile is extremely precious

source_meaning: to be left shaken but unhurt, to get off lightly (from an adversity), to dodge a bullet

target_meaning: follow in someone's footsteps

target_meaning: lively and vigorous

target_meaning: completely empty

source_meaning: to leave alone, leave be

source_meaning: worth one's weight in gold
target_meaning: an inch of land is worth an inch of gold; land is precious
